'''''Magua''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] operated by [[Airam (group)|Airam]] clan leader [[Ilay]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
